'''bashugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylaloe|xylaloe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylaloe|xylaloe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bashugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshigith|bæshigith]] || [[word:bæshigij|bæshigij]] || [[word:bæshigish|bæshigish]] || [[word:bæshigi|bæshigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashushuguth|bashushuguth]] || [[word:bashushuguj|bashushuguj]] || [[word:bashushugush|bashushugush]] || [[word:bashushugu|bashushugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashuguth|bashuguth]] || [[word:bashuguj|bashuguj]] || [[word:bashugush|bashugush]] || [[word:bashugu|bashugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashufguth|bashufguth]] || [[word:bashufguj|bashufguj]] || [[word:bashufgush|bashufgush]] || [[word:bashufguf|bashufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashuguthu|bashuguthu]] || [[word:bashuguju|bashuguju]] || [[word:bashugushu|bashugushu]] || [[word:bashuguku|bashuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashuguth|bashuguth]] || [[word:bashuguj|bashuguj]] || [[word:bashugush|bashugush]] || [[word:bashugu|bashugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashuguthul|bashuguthul]] || [[word:bashugujul|bashugujul]] || [[word:bashugushul|bashugushul]] || [[word:bashugukul|bashugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashuguthuthu|bashuguthuthu]] || [[word:bashugujuju|bashugujuju]] || [[word:bashugushushu|bashugushushu]] || [[word:bashuguku|bashuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashuguthun|bashuguthun]] || [[word:bashugujun|bashugujun]] || [[word:bashugushun|bashugushun]] || [[word:bashugukun|bashugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashuguthuoro|bashuguthuoro]] || [[word:bashugujuoro|bashugujuoro]] || [[word:bashugushuoro|bashugushuoro]] || [[word:bashugukuoro|bashugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
